offer: For accounting firms processing 10–50 invoices/month, manual report generation causes late client reports. We automate report creation instead of manual report creation using spreadsheets.
problem: Manual report generation leads to inefficiencies and delays.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools and resources
try_it: Let users try custom report templates and dashboard tools on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
